ddls:
CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "buyer_po_no" TEXT /* Purchase order number from the buyer */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items ordered */,
  "country" INTEGER /* Country of the buyer */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time before delivery in days */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "estimated_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "handover_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was handed over */,
  "shipping_mode" INTEGER /* Mode of shipping (e.g., air, sea) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes related to the order */,
  "shipping_confirmation_number" INTEGER /* Shipping confirmation number */,
  "delivery_status" INTEGER /* Status of the delivery (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "cutoff_date" TEXT /* Cut-off date for the order */,
  "manufacture_location_id" INTEGER /* Manufacture location ID */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the purchase order */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase order was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the purchase order */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase order was last updated */,
  "purchase_order_status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase order (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_delivery_status FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_status") REFERENCES delivery_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_shipping_mode FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_mode") REFERENCES shipping_modes ("shipping_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_manufacture_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacture_location_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_locations ("manufacture_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applicable in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_modes" (
  "shipping_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping mode (e.g., air, sea, ground) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping mode */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the shipping mode */,
  "shipping_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time required for the shipping mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturing_locations" (
  "manufacture_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturing location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturing location */,
  "production_capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the manufacturing location */,
  "production_lead_time" INTEGER /* Production lead time for the manufacturing location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacture_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery status (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the delivery status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement manager, logistics coordinator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remarks" (
  "remark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remark */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the remark */,
  "remark_text" TEXT /* Text of the remark */,
  "remark_date" TEXT /* Date when the remark was made */,
  "remark_category" TEXT /* Category of the remark (e.g., issue, feedback, suggestion) */,
  "remark_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the remark (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remarks_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_confirmations" (
  "confirmation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping confirmation */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase order */,
  "confirmation_number" TEXT /* Shipping confirmation number */,
  "confirmation_date" TEXT /* Date when confirmation was received */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipping confirmation */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipping confirmation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confirmation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_confirmations_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cutoff_dates" (
  "cutoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cut-off date entry */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase order */,
  "cutoff_date" TEXT /* Cut-off date for the order */,
  "cutoff_time" TEXT /* Cut-off time for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cutoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cutoff_dates_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase order */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was logged */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed log message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase order */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)
